entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Source of sleep data being ingested (sleep logs with scores, stages, efficiency)

entities.name: Sleep Data Ingestion Pipeline
entities.context: Python script that upserts sleep sessions and stages, deduplicates by date, and prioritizes main sleep logs

entities.name: Sleep Score
entities.context: Numeric sleep quality metric extracted from Fitbit sleep logs

entities.name: Sleep Stages
entities.context: Breakdown of sleep phases (e.g. deep, light, REM) stored per session

entities.name: Sleep Efficiency
entities.context: Ratio metric capturing sleep quality, passed to upsert function

entities.name: Main Sleep Deduplication
entities.context: Logic that prioritizes main sleep sessions over naps and longer sessions over shorter ones when multiple logs exist for the same date

relationships.context: Pipeline reads raw sleep log payloads sourced from Fitbit API
Extracts and stores sleep score per date
Upserts sleep stage breakdowns per session
Passes efficiency metric to upsert function
Applies deduplication logic preferring main sleep and longer duration when multiple logs share a date
